---
name: readme-blueprint-generator
description: 'Intelligent README.md generation prompt that analyzes project documentation structure and creates comprehensive repository documentation.'
---

# README Generator Prompt

Generate a comprehensive README.md for this repository by analyzing existing documentation and `.github/copilot-instructions.md`.

## Output structure

- Project name and purpose
- Technology stack
- Architecture overview
- Getting started
- Project structure
- Key features
- Development workflow
- Coding standards
- Testing
- Contributing
- License

## Rules

- Keep content practical and developer-oriented.
- Prefer concise sections with clear headings and code blocks where useful.
- Preserve repository-specific conventions and real commands.
